title: Modular System Upgrade Decision Algorithm
description: Algorithm to determine whether to upgrade individual components or replace entire system
code:
FUNCTION EvaluateUpgrade(componentList, newComponentCost, systemReplacementCost):
 totalUpgradeCost = 0
 FOR each component IN componentList:
 IF component.isObsolete AND component.isUpgradable THEN
 totalUpgradeCost = totalUpgradeCost + component.upgradeCost
 ELSE IF component.isObsolete AND NOT component.isUpgradable THEN
 totalUpgradeCost = totalUpgradeCost + component.replacementCost
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 environmentalImpactUpgrade = CalculateCarbonFootprint(totalUpgradeCost)
 environmentalImpactReplace = CalculateCarbonFootprint(systemReplacementCost)
 
 IF totalUpgradeCost < systemReplacementCost AND environmentalImpactUpgrade < environmentalImpactReplace THEN
 RETURN "UPGRADE COMPONENTS"
 ELSE
 RETURN "REPLACE SYSTEM"
 END IF
END FUNCTION

title: Backward Compatibility Check Algorithm
description: Algorithm to verify if new system maintains backward compatibility with legacy data formats
code:
FUNCTION CheckBackwardCompatibility(newSystem, legacyFormats, legacyAPIs):
 supportedFormats = newSystem.getSupportedFormats()
 supportedAPIs = newSystem.getSupportedAPIs()
 
 compatibleFormats = []
 FOR each format IN legacyFormats:
 IF format IN supportedFormats THEN
 compatibleFormats.append(format)
 ELSE IF newSystem.hasFormatAdapter(format) THEN
 compatibleFormats.append(format + " (via adapter)")
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 compatibleAPIs = []
 FOR each api IN legacyAPIs:
 IF api IN supportedAPIs THEN
 compatibleAPIs.append(api)
 ELSE IF newSystem.hasAPIEmulator(api) THEN
 compatibleAPIs.append(api + " (via emulator)")
 END IF
 END FOR
 
 compatibilityRatio = (LEN(compatibleFormats) + LEN(compatibleAPIs)) / (LEN(legacyFormats) + LEN(legacyAPIs))
 
 RETURN {"formats": compatibleFormats, "apis": compatibleAPIs, "score": compatibilityRatio}
END FUNCTION

title: E-waste Recycling Decision System
description: Algorithm to determine optimal end-of-life action for IT equipment
code:
FUNCTION EvaluateEOLAction(device):
 IF device.functionalQuality > 80% AND device.technologyCurrent THEN
 RETURN "REFURBISH FOR REUSE"
 ELSE IF device.hasRecoverableComponents THEN
 RETURN "RECYCLE COMPONENTS"
 ELSE IF device.hasHazardousMaterials THEN
 RETURN "CERTIFIED DISPOSAL"
 ELSE
 RETURN "STANDARD RECYCLING"
 END IF
END FUNCTION

FUNCTION ProcessEOLBatch(deviceList):
 actionCounts = {"reuse": 0, "recycle": 0, "dispose": 0}
 environmentalSavings = 0
 
 FOR each device IN deviceList:
 action = EvaluateEOLAction(device)
 actionCounts[action] = actionCounts[action] + 1
 environmentalSavings = environmentalSavings + CalculateSavings(device, action)
 END FOR
 
 RETURN {"actions": actionCounts, "totalSavings": environmentalSavings}
END FUNCTION
